scripts.test:workspace: npm test --workspace @arcships/light-ocr-runtime && npm test --workspace @arcships/light-ocr && npm run test:contract --workspace @arcships/light-ocr-server
scripts.typecheck: tsc --strict --noEmit --skipLibCheck false --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node tools/npm/smoke.ts packages/runtime/test/types.ts
